text: MOCCal is a Python application for high-dimensional, multi-omic traveling-wave ion mobility mass spectrometry (TWIM-MS) data analysis.
source_excerpt: MOCCal, or Multi-Omic CCS Calibrator, is a Python application for high-dimensional, multi-omic traveling-wave ion mobility mass spectrometry (TWIM-MS) data anlaysis.

text: MOCCal provides functionality for collision cross section (CCS) calibration.
source_excerpt: Functionality includes collision cross section (CCS) calibration, experimental data biomolecular class assignment, and experimental class-specific CCS calculations.

text: The terms arrival time and drift time are used interchangeably within MOCCal software for convenience.
source_excerpt: The terms arrival time and drift time are used interchangeably within the software for convenience.

text: TWIM platforms record the time at which the ion reaches the detector (arrival time) rather than the time an ion spends within the TWIM cell (drift time).
source_excerpt: However, it should be noted that TWIM platforms record the time at which the ion reaches the detector (arrival time) rather than the time an ion spends within the TWIM cell (drift time).
